fields.label: Client name
fields.name: client_name
fields.instructions: e.g. "Alexis Delivery Service" — used in the breadcrumb and page title.

fields.label: Client logo
fields.name: client_logo
fields.instructions: Wide logo mark, shown at ~150x14px.

fields.label: Industry / tag line
fields.name: industry_tag
fields.instructions: e.g. "Dallas · Moving & Delivery" — shown as the hero eyebrow.

fields.label: Client live site URL
fields.name: live_url
fields.instructions: Optional — shown as "View live site" link in the hero.

fields.label: Hero title
fields.name: hero_title
fields.instructions: HTML allowed, e.g. wrap a phrase in ... to highlight it in italic serif.

fields.label: Hero stat rows
fields.name: hero_stats

sub_fields.label: Value
sub_fields.name: value
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "25+", "#3", "8" — plain text, HTML allowed for a superscript span.

fields.instructions: 2-3 short stat rows shown under the hero copy.

fields.label: Chart current value
fields.name: chart_current_value
fields.instructions: e.g. "1,297" — the big number shown above the chart.

fields.label: Chart badge text
fields.name: chart_badge
fields.instructions: e.g. "Built from zero in 24 months"

fields.label: Chart data points
fields.name: chart_points
fields.instructions: Plain numbers, in order (e.g. monthly traffic). The chart line/shape is drawn automatically from these — any number of points works.

fields.label: Context pills
fields.name: context_pills

sub_fields.label: Icon (lucide name)
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: A lucide.dev icon name: tag, map-pin, calendar, search, etc.

fields.instructions: Small pills under the hero — industry, location, engagement length, service type.

fields.label: Strategy section title
fields.name: strategy_title
fields.instructions:
HTML allowed,
for a line break.

fields.label: Strategy lede paragraph
fields.name: strategy_lede
fields.instructions: HTML allowed, e.g. wrap the last sentence in ....

fields.label: Strategy cards
fields.name: strategy_cards
fields.instructions: Usually 3 cards, numbered automatically (01, 02, 03...).

fields.label: Results section title
fields.name: results_title
fields.instructions: HTML allowed, e.g. emphasis.

fields.label: Results metrics
fields.name: results_metrics
fields.instructions: 2-4 metric tiles.

fields.label: Keyword table caption
fields.name: table_caption
fields.default_value: A sample of the keywords ranking today

fields.label: Keyword rows
fields.name: keyword_rows
fields.instructions: Optional keyword ranking table.

fields.label: Related case studies
fields.name: related_case_studies
fields.instructions: Pick up to 2 other case studies to feature at the bottom of this page.

fields.label: SEO title tag
fields.name: seo_title
fields.instructions: Leave blank to auto-generate from client name.
